name: Praemium Limited
analysis: PPS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.7300, stop A$0.6584, target A$0.8062 (1.06:1) — then trail it.
